candidate_definition_hints.text: ni-midi2 is a C++17 library implementing MIDI2 UMP 1.1 and MIDI CI 1.2
`ni-midi2` is a C++ library for working with MIDI 2 Universal MIDI Packets (UMP) and MIDI-CI 1.2 messages.
